patch.description: Updates an existing project by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the project to update.

409.description: Conflict - another project with the provided Stripe details already exists.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project by its ID.

parameters.description: The ID of the project to delete.

parameters.description: The ID of the price to retrieve.

parameters.description: The ID of the price to update.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a price by its ID.

parameters.description: The ID of the price to delete.

Synchronizes an existing Stripe coupon into the system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the coupon to update.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a coupon by its ID.

parameters.description: The ID of the coupon to delete.

post.description: Creates a new promotion code for a specific coupon.

patch.description: Updates a promotion code's mutable fields. Only active, expiresAt, maxRedemptions, and metadata can be changed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the promotion code to update.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a promotion code by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the promotion code to delete.

get.description: Returns details of a single invoice.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an invoice. Only permitted for invoices with status "draft".

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the invoice to delete.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of invoices for a specific customer.
Returns a paginated list of invoices for a specific project.

patch.description: Voids an invoice. Only permitted for invoices with status "open". Once voided, cannot be un-voided.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the invoice to void.

get.description: Returns a list of payment methods for a specific customer.

delete.description: Removes a payment method from a customer.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the payment method to delete.

post.description: Increases the available token balance for a specific customer.
Freezes (reserves) a token amount for a specific customer, preventing spending until unfrozen.
Releases previously frozen tokens, making them available for the customer again.
Decreases the available token balance for a specific customer.

get.description: Returns the current token balance for a specific customer.
Returns the current token balance for a specific customer.

parameters.name: read
parameters.description: Filters alerts based on their read/unread status. Set to true to retrieve acknowledged alerts, or false to fetch pending notifications that require attention.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Granular filter for domain-specific alert categories. This allows focusing on critical event types such as financial discrepancies, lifecycle transitions, or usage thresholds.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the customer to filter alerts for. Essential for tenant-specific troubleshooting and audit trails.

404.description: Alert with this identifier not found

403.description: Alert with this identifier does not belong to the current user

404.description: Alert with this identifier not found

info.title: Billy API
info.description: The Billy API documentation. This API handles user authentication, profile management, and project coordination.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user login, registration, and password management

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user profiles and data

email.description: The email address of the user

firstName.description: The first name of the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

email.description: The unique email address for the account

password.description: The secure password for the account (min 8 characters)

email.description: The email address of the user who forgot their password

confirmPassword.description: The confirmation of the new password

stripeId.description: The Stripe ID of the coupon to synchronize.

projectId.description: The target project ID for the synchronization.

withPromoCodes.description: Whether to also synchronize associated promotion codes.

percentOff.description: New percentage off. Cannot be changed if amountOff is set.

amountOff.description: New amount off in smallest currency unit.

maxRedemptions.description: Maximum number of times this coupon can be redeemed.

valid.description: Whether the coupon is currently valid.

active.description: Whether the promotion code is currently active.

expiresAt.description: Date when the promotion code expires.

maxRedemptions.description: Maximum number of times this promotion code can be redeemed.

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs for additional information.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer to create a portal session for.

currentPeriodStart.description: The start date of the current period

currentPeriodEnd.description: The end date of the current period

cancelAtPeriodEnd.description: Whether to cancel the subscription at the end of the current period

quantity.description: The quantity of the subscription (e.g. number of seats)

customAmount.description: The custom amount for enterprise (in cents)
